onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Sign up to get a free pack — or preview the lobby first.
onboarding.sheetHint: Swipe down anytime to browse the app.
onboarding.promptBody: Create an account to save pulls to your vault, claim rewards, and unlock your welcome pack.
onboarding.guestClaimBody: Vault saves and rewards need an account — it only takes a moment.
onboarding.friendsGuestBody: Preview the space now. Sign in to add friends, share your QR, and sync your circle.

search.title: Search
search.emptyBody: Type a pack name, tag, or line to jump in fast.

packDetails.missingBody: We couldn’t find this pack in the demo catalog.

marketplace.storeLead: Verified partner inventory — singles, sealed, graded. Browse and save for checkout (opening packs stays on Home).
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search singles, sealed, sets, or stores…
marketplace.promoBody: Orders over $50 from participating stores ship free. See each listing for details.
marketplace.whyPoint1Body: Partner stores ship quickly so you can get cards in time for events and league nights. Cutoff times vary by seller.
marketplace.whyPoint2Body: Compare listings across shops in one place. Pull Hub’s commission is built into partner pricing — no surprise fees at checkout.
marketplace.whyPoint3Body: We aggregate inventory from trusted sellers across regions — from Japanese promos to English staples and sealed wax.
marketplace.emptyHint: Try another category or sort, or clear search.
marketplace.listingDemoBody: Checkout for “{{title}}” isn’t wired yet — this screen is listings-only.
marketplace.demoNote: Demo: payments, cart, and seller payouts are not connected. Pack opening stays on the Home tab.

helpCenter.lead: Quick answers for credits, shipping, and drops. This is sample content — replace with your real help articles before launch.

credits.a: Credits are the in-app currency used to open digital packs. Purchases in this preview may be simulated — final pricing, refunds, and bundles will be published before launch.

shipping.q: Where do you ship physical cards?
shipping.a: Marketplace orders ship from partner stores. Cutoffs, carriers, and fees vary by listing. Add a shipping address in Account so checkout is faster when payments go live.

drops.a: Hot drops are limited-time or high-demand pack releases. They are different from account promos (bonuses and coupons). Tap Hot Drops on Account for a short explainer.

helpCenter.responseTime: We aim to reply within 1–2 business days (demo — not monitored).

shippingAddress.lead: Used for marketplace orders and prize shipping when fulfillment is live. Saved only on this device in the preview build.
shippingAddress.savedBody: Your shipping address was saved on this device.
shippingAddress.missingBody: Enter at least name, street line 1, city, and country.

tierBenefits.lead: Tiers are a loyalty ladder based on XP from activity. Sample perks below — tune before launch.
tierBenefits.progressHint: You have {{xp}} XP. Next tier unlocks at {{need}} XP (demo ladder).
tierBenefits.topTier: You are at the highest preview tier — thanks for playing with the sample data.
tierBenefits.disclaimer: Benefits, thresholds, and availability are illustrative only and may change.

notifications.lead: Choose what we can notify you about. Preferences are stored on this device only in the preview.
notifications.note: System notification permission is requested separately when push is wired. Email and SMS controls will live here too.

order.title: Orders & shipping
order.sub: Tracking, delays, and delivery updates for marketplace orders.

promos.title: Promos & credits
promos.sub: Bonus credits, coupons, and seasonal campaigns.

hotDropsInfo.body: Hot drops are time-limited or high-demand pack releases — often a specific set, collab, or flash window. They are about the product and timing.
hotDropsInfo.b1: Announced start and end times (or “while supplies last”).
hotDropsInfo.b2: May have different odds or price than evergreen packs — always read the pack details.
hotDropsInfo.b3: Can sell out quickly; enabling notifications helps you catch restocks.
hotDropsInfo.callout: Not the same as Promos: promos are marketing incentives (bonus credits, coupons), not the pack release itself.

promosInfo.body: Promos are marketing programs: bonus credits, coupon codes, seasonal campaigns, or partner offers. They reward actions like signing up, buying bundles, or referring friends.
promosInfo.b1: Shown in-app, email, or social — each promo has its own rules and dates.
promosInfo.b2: May stack with tiers or be limited to certain packs — read the fine print before launch.
promosInfo.b3: Different from Hot Drops: a promo is the offer; a hot drop is the product release.
promosInfo.vsHotBody: Use Hot Drops to learn about limited pack releases. Use Promos (this screen) to understand bonus credits and coupon-style incentives.

pullHistoryScreen.lead: Every completed play — newest first. Pending pulls stay in the pack flow until you cash out or ship.

linkedAccounts.body: Linking lets you sign in to the same Pull Hub profile with more than one method (for example Google and Apple), so you are not locked to a single login.
linkedAccounts.whatBody: It is not about merging two separate app accounts. It is about attaching sign-in providers to one account for convenience and recovery.
linkedAccounts.note: Provider linking will use your auth settings (e.g. Clerk) in production.

identityVerification.body: Identity verification (sometimes called KYC) confirms you are a real person and meets age or compliance rules before high-value payouts, certain promos, or regulated features.
identityVerification.whyBody: It reduces fraud, protects minors, and satisfies financial or marketplace rules when money or valuable prizes move between users and platforms.
identityVerification.note: This build only explains the concept. Wire your vendor (e.g. Persona, Stripe Identity) before requiring verification.

payoutMethod.body: When you sell cards or receive cash-outs, payouts go to a linked bank or debit card. This preview does not connect to real banking.
payoutMethod.line1: Add a bank account (ACH / local rails) or debit card depending on region.
payoutMethod.line2: Verify small deposits or instant micro-charges when your processor requires it.
payoutMethod.line3: Payout timing and fees follow marketplace rules — see Terms before launch.
payoutMethod.note: Replace this placeholder with real payout onboarding when Stripe Connect or your PSP is integrated.

demoBanner: Preview build — credits & rewards are simulated.

demoSimulation.title: Simulation notice
demoSimulation.body: This preview uses simulated credits and rewards. No real money is charged or paid out. Marketplace purchases are not connected — this is for demonstration only.
demoSimulation.titleJa: シミュレーションについてのお知らせ
demoSimulation.bodyJa: 本プレビューではクレジットおよび報酬はすべてシミュレーションです。実際の課金や送金は発生しません。マーケットでの購入は接続されておらず、デモ／プレゼン用です。
demoSimulation.confirm: I understand / 了解しました

home.spotlightBody: Hand-picked drops and promos. Pick a product line, then narrow with filters.
home.emptyCategory: No packs match this line and filter yet.

lobby.railNewSub: Fresh stock in this line — first look before the floor fills.
lobby.railHotSub: Chase-forward drops with boosted energy — windows stay tight.
lobby.railGradedSub: Slabbed pulls and graded chase — curated for collectors.

packs.browseSub: Pick a line, sort the floor, run it when you're ready

hero.sub: Limited-time packs with better hit rates — stack credits and chase the big pull

friends.title: Friends
friends.lead: Link up with people you play with — share your handle, scan QR, or send your invite link.
friends.usernameHint: Friends add you by this unique username — same as on your Player tab.
friends.demoHint: Demo: try jordan, sam_r, or casey_m — or legacy codes TCG-100001…003.
friends.emptyBody: When you add someone, they’ll show up here so you can build on more social features later.
friends.inviteLead: Share your link — new signups can earn welcome rewards (see Rewards for details).
friends.leaderboardPreviewHint: Total estimated value · tap for full board
friends.emptyActivity: Add collectors to see their pulls here.
friends.emptyLeaderboardHint: Invite friends to climb the board together.
friends.emptySquadBody: Add collectors to see their pulls, stats, and leaderboard spots.

social.profileMissingBody: We don’t have a demo profile for this username yet.
social.giftBody: This is a mock — no pack was sent.
social.notFriendBody: Add this collector as a friend to view their profile.
social.leaderboardLead: Ranked by the selected metric. Demo data only.
social.compareSub: Side-by-side stats — higher wins each row.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.noPullsBody: Rip your first pack — your hits and credits will show up here.

account.title: Player
account.followSub: Follow our official channels for promos, drops, and updates.
account.guestSignInTitle: Sign in to do anything here
account.guestSignInBody: Guests can only browse. Sign in with Google, Apple, or email to open packs, buy credits, checkout, and use Friends.
account.pullHistorySub: Every open, credit win, and hit — complete log

promotions.screenLead: Invite friends or enter a code. Rewards apply to your wallet right away in this preview.
promotions.codeExplainer: One use per account. Try WELCOME, FREEPACK, or LAUNCH.
promotions.referralBody: When a friend creates an account from your link, you both can earn rewards. Full referral payouts will use a server ledger at launch.

locale.title: Language & Region
locale.regionHint: Used for dates, currency display, and future shipping defaults.
locale.fallbackNote: All languages in the list have full UI translations. Region still controls dates and currency display.

buyCredits.title: Buy Credits
buyCredits.subtitle: Credits open packs. Promotional discounts show on smaller bundles; higher tiers are list price.
buyCredits.mockNote: Preview: no real payment — credits are added instantly for demos.
buyCredits.disclaimer: After confirming a credit purchase, cancellations, refunds, or point returns may not be possible. (Final policy before launch.)
buyCredits.mockFooter: Simulated bundles — replace with real checkout before launch.
buyCredits.liveFooter: Secure checkout · Instant delivery · No expiry

lootBox.title: Probability of contents
lootBox.lead: Pack openings are randomized. Approximate tier rates below are for disclosure; specific packs may vary.
lootBox.footnote: Rates are illustrative for this preview build. Published products will show final odds before purchase where required.

welcome.signupPromoBody: Create an account now and we’ll add a bonus welcome pack to your first session (demo — grant when live).
welcome.guestHint: You can browse the catalog. Sign in to open packs, buy credits, checkout, and use Friends.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Use Google, Apple, or email. New accounts: we’ll email you a one-time code to verify.
auth.verifyHint: Enter the code we sent to {{email}}.
auth.signInIncomplete: Could not finish sign-in. If you use two-factor authentication, we’ll add support next.
auth.verifyFailed: Verification didn’t complete. Check the code and try again.
auth.dashboardHint: Clerk Dashboard: enable Google (oauth_google), Apple (oauth_apple), and Email + password + email code verification.
auth.signOutMessage: You will need to sign in again to use your synced data when it is available.

linkPhone.title: Verify your phone
linkPhone.subtitle: We’ll text you a code once. Pick your country, then enter your mobile number — no need to type +1 yourself.
linkPhone.codeHint: Enter the code we texted you.
linkPhone.invalid: Enter a valid phone number for the selected country.
linkPhone.nanpInvalid: US and Canada numbers need 10 digits (area code + number).
linkPhone.phoneMissing: Could not start phone verification. Try again.
linkPhone.verifyFailed: That code didn’t work. Check the message and try again.
linkPhone.dashboardHint: Clerk Dashboard → User & authentication → Phone: enable SMS / verification. You can turn off “Sign in with phone” if you only want Google / Apple / email sign-in.
linkPhone.smsDevHint: SMS not sending? In development, add a test phone in the Clerk dashboard or connect Twilio / your SMS provider — Clerk won’t send real texts until that’s configured.

profileOnboarding.title: Set up your profile
profileOnboarding.subtitle: Choose a public username and how you’d like to appear. You can change this later when account settings are wired to the server.
profileOnboarding.profileHint: Your username is unique and is what friends use to find you.
profileOnboarding.usernameInvalid: Use 2–20 characters: letters, numbers, and underscores only.
profileOnboarding.genericError: Could not save your profile. Try again.

paymentPortal.digitalRoutingNote: Digital credits: use App Store / Google Play in-app purchase when live — not Stripe for coins.
paymentPortal.marketplaceLead: Partner listings ship real products. Checkout uses a physical-goods payment flow (server-backed Stripe), separate from in-app credit packs.
paymentPortal.physicalPolicy: Physical goods only — PaymentIntent created on your server ({{mode}}). Apple Pay / Google Pay may appear for shipping purchases, not for digital currency.
paymentPortal.physicalStubBody: Wire your backend to create a Stripe PaymentIntent, then open the client with the returned client secret. No keys in the app binary.

myQr.title: Your username
myQr.subtitle: Friends scan this QR or type your username to add you.
myQr.scanAnotherSub: Use the camera to add them from their QR

qrScanner.title: Scan friend QR
qrScanner.permText: We need camera access to scan friend QR codes.
qrScanner.hint: Align the QR code within the frame
qrScanner.webBody: Open the app on your phone to scan a friend's QR code, or enter their username below.

insufficientCredits.title: Not Enough Credits
insufficientCredits.body: You need more credits to open this pack.
insufficientCredits.bodyWithAmount: You need {{needed}} more credits to open this pack. Add credits now to continue.

friendsAlerts.addedBody: {{name}} is now in your friends list.
friendsAlerts.selfBody: You can't add your own username.
friendsAlerts.duplicateBody: This friend is already in your list.
friendsAlerts.invalidIdBody: Usernames are 2–20 characters: letters, numbers, and underscores. Ask your friend for their handle.
friendsAlerts.notFoundBody: No demo account matches that username yet. Double-check spelling or try again later.
friendsAlerts.noUsernameBody: Finish profile setup so you get a unique username to share with friends.
